title: belvisia platyrhynchos
intro: Belvisia platyrhynchos is a plant species of the family Melastomataceae, commonly known as the 'princess of the night' or 'queen of the night', due to its nocturnal blooming flowers. It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Belvisia platyrhynchos include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. The plant is used in various herbal preparations, such as infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
